narrative:
Thompson Twp township has 835 registered voters, with 60.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 18.8 percentage points.
